title: More Menu
heading: Demography
text:
# Demography

As per Provisional population figures of 2011 Census, the total no of Mandals are 64.
Demography of West District

| Sl.No. | Demographic Indicator | Demographic Value |
| 1 | Area | 12,805 Sq Km |
| 2 | No. of Erstwhile Taluks | 19 |
| 3 | No. of Mandal Praja Parishads | 62 |
| 4 | No. of Municipalities | 7 |
| 5 | No. of Census | 14 |
| 6 | No. of Revenue Divisions | 7 |
| 7 | No. of Revenue Mandals | 64 (62 Rural + 2 Urban) |
| 8 | No. of Gram Panchayats | 1069 |
| 9 | No. of Municipal Corporations | 2 |
| 10 | No. of Villages | 1681 |
